post.description: Run an on-demand planning cycle for one greenhouse, out of band from the fixed cadence (operator only, slice 3). Uses the same single-flight and safety gates as a scheduled cycle: refused 409 if the optimizer is disabled or that greenhouse already has a cycle in flight. The resulting plan is fetched from GET /api/optimizer/greenhouses/{id}/plan once the cycle completes.

202.description: The cycle was accepted for dispatch.
